title: Pathfinder Navigation
description: Present the route in a beautiful way
body:
What should I do if I get lost in mc? What should I do if I can't understand the map? What should I do if I have no permission to transmit? You can give this mod a try. This is a mod that helps players find the route. It is different from map mods and stone tablets. It will only show the roads to players by indicating the routes.

The existing types of wayfinding compasses are:

Stellar Compass · Navigator: An arrow is generated under the player's feet and always points towards the destination.

Stellar Compass · Foundation: It can quickly trace the route and show players the nearest route to the target point with particles.

​Stellar Compass · Pathfinder: In addition to the abilities of the previous compass, it will stop and wait for the player when they are far away. When blocked, it will find the nearest excavation route and display shovels, pickaxes, and axes to prompt the player to create a path by destruction.

​Stellar Compass · Guardian: It will slowly fly towards the target point and be able to expand the barrier. The barrier can: 1. Illuminate the surrounding blocks. 2. Stop the monster's advance. 3. Clear the approaching arrows.

Recipe:

Use items such as Soul sand to synthesize soul stone slabs, then synthesize compass cores, and further synthesize various compasses.



在mc中迷路了怎么办？看不懂地图怎么办？传送没权限怎么办？可以来试试这个mod。这是一个帮助玩家找到路线的mod。它不同于地图mod和石碑，它会仅使用指明路线的方式来为玩家展示道路。

目前已有的寻路罗盘有：

星辰罗盘·指向型：在玩家脚下产生箭头，并始终指向终点方向。

星辰罗盘·基础型：能够快速划过路线，用粒子为玩家展示接近目标点的最近路线。

星辰罗盘·引导型：除了上一种罗盘的能力外，会在玩家距离较远时停下等待玩家，被阻挡时会找到最近的挖掘路线，并展示铁铲，铁镐，铁斧提示玩家通过破坏产生一条路径。

星辰罗盘·守护型：会缓慢飞向目标点，并且能够展开屏障。屏障能够：1，照亮周围的方块。2，停止怪物的前进。3，清除靠近的箭矢。

合成方式：

使用灵魂沙等物品合成灵魂石板，然后合成罗盘核心，并进一步合成各种罗盘。
